name: neuro-academy-v2.0
description: Neuro-Academy v2.0 - Telegram Mini App Educational Platform

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/web & npm run start:dev -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
